title: Moneys
description: turns emeralds into money along with the 2 emerald ores and the emerald block
body: This is a very simple 16x16 resource pack that changes emeralds, which are essentially the money of minecraft, into actual money, and yes this includes emerald ore and emerald blocks! This pack also renames the emerald, emerald ore and emerald block so that they all have stuff to do with money.
